DstPolicy.description: Explicit resolution for a nonexistent (spring-forward gap) and an ambiguous (fall-back overlap) wall time. Absence is an error, never a guess.

Instant.description: A UTC instant; the only instant representation.

RecurrenceByDay.description: A BYDAY entry: a weekday, optionally with an ordinal.

ordinal.description: BYDAY ordinal, e.g. 2 = second, -1 = last; non-zero. Omit for every matching weekday.

RecurrenceRule.description: An RFC 5545 RRULE. Only `frequency` is required; `interval` defaults to 1 and `wkst` to 1 (Monday). `count` and `until` are mutually exclusive.

wkst.description: Week start as an ISO-8601 weekday; defaults to 1 (Monday).

SeriesMaster.description: The recurring master. start/end are wall-clock components interpreted in `timeZone`; they are resolved to instants via the request `dstPolicy`.

WallTime.description: Wall-clock calendar components, resolved to an instant only via an explicit time zone + dstPolicy.

description: Return the first occurrence of a recurring master strictly after `after`, or null. Same RFC 5545 §3.3.10 expansion as expand_recurrence; an otherwise-unbounded rule is searched forward to a fixed horizon.

after.description: The result is strictly after this instant.

exDates.description: Occurrence start instants to exclude (RFC 5545 EXDATE).

title: next_occurrence request
